name: readme-forge
description: Production-quality README generator. Reads your project, detects your stack, and writes docs that look handcrafted — not templated.
author: readme-forge

skills.name: readme
skills.description: Generate or update a README from project context. Detects project type, stack, and style automatically.

skills.name: section
skills.description: Generate or rewrite a single README section (badges, features, install, usage, api, config, contributing).

skills.name: badges
skills.description: Generate shields.io and other badge sets for your project.
